name: genrtl
description: Up-to-date Code Docs For Any Prompt
long_description: GenRTL MCP pulls up-to-date, version-specific documentation and code examples straight from the source — and places them directly into your prompt.

tools.name: Resolve GenRTL Library ID
tools.description: Resolves a package/product name to a GenRTL-compatible library ID and returns matching libraries.

tools.name: Query Documentation
tools.description: Retrieves and queries up-to-date documentation and code examples from GenRTL.
